events.detail: Local Context app started (next dev --turbo), /api/health returned 200. Public fmp MCP endpoint https://mcp.ctxprotocol.com/fmp/mcp serves 27/27 methods via Streamable HTTP initialize handshake (serverInfo fmp-contributor v1.0.0). Slug fmp confirmed.

Marketplace stage post-submission, TOOL_ID 15c60ca5-94c9-4257-89c4-542a4745e89f, 27 methods live (14 new: earnings, dividends, insider_activity, ownership, sec_filings, peers, growth, revenue_segments, congressional_trades, index_constituents, valuation, quality_scores, sector_performance, macro_calendar). Outstanding gates: listingDiscoveryParity DRIFT (discovery shows 13, should show 27), re-run query validation against 27-method set, description sync.

discover-live-markets.mjs produced deterministic FMP grounding snapshot: 27-tool catalog, 18 stable endpoints, 26 doc pages, 20 real large-cap tickers across 11 sectors, 5 indexes, 7 SEC filing types, 8 macro event types. Local FMP key is placeholder so no live price call; remote endpoint holds real key.

alpha-researcher produced verticalAlphaResearch (10 alpha categories, 4 cross-tool chains, 5 FMP-UI gaps) + 18 must-win prompts (6 lookup / 7 multi-step / 5 ceiling). All 14 new methods covered. Phase 1c validation PASS: every prompt grounded in a real entity, answerabilityNote names fmp tool + /stable/ endpoint + fields, no deictic refs, single-venue FMP.

SKILL-prescribed google/gemini-3-flash-preview via OpenRouter returns HTTP 403 (provider TOS block) on every financial prompt; all other OpenRouter :free tiers return 404 (unavailable for free); direct GEMINI_API_KEY not enabled for project 676658074260. Substituted meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct (cheap paid, no tools, no live data) as the no-tools baseline proxy. Preserves the differentiation-gate intent (what a capable chatbot says with NO tools). Documented in run-free-baseline.mjs header and final report.

Paid SDK sweep in progress. Through 9/18: 6 answers (nvda-earnings, jnj-dividend, fomc-macro, lly-quality, aapl-revenue-segments, tsla-valuation-dcf), 3 autoWeak (xom-insider-activity capability_miss, meta-congressional-trades capability_miss, semiconductor-sector-performance timeout). capability_miss pattern: agent not selecting insider_activity / congressional_trades tools on those two prompts.
Free baseline (meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct substitute, no tools) completed 18/18 prompts with 0 errors. Differentiation comparison data ready.

SSH temp-port smoke (port 4099, unauth, reusing production .env FMP_API_KEY) called tools/call on all 27 fmp methods. 27/27 passed, 0 failed. Accuracy check PASS (get_company_profile AAPL returned symbol AAPL + sector Technology + market/price fields). Confirms the 14 new methods' handlers all work against the real FMP API. Temp server killed by port. Production mcp-fmp untouched (restarts=0).

Paid SDK sweep complete: 13 answers, 3 capability_miss (xom-insider, meta-congressional, cost-sec-filings), 2 error/timeouts (semiconductor-sector, nvda-relative-value). 5 autoWeak / 18 = 27.8% weak. passRate 0.722.

3 parallel pipeline-reviewer batches (glm-5.2-max) + autoWeak cap 2.0 + differentiation classifier. satisfactionMean=2.611, weakQueryRate=0.778 (14/18), highFragilityRate=0.556, baselineBeatenRate=0.722. Differentiation: 6 high, 7 moderate, 5 low. Dominant root cause: tool_selection_error (12/18) — agent discovery/selection loads only ~13 of 27 FMP methods and omits the specialized new endpoints.

Release gates: blocked. Reviewer fails (mean 2.611<3.5, fragility 0.556>0.3, weakRate 78%>20%, highDiff-below-3: jnj/fomc/jpm). Local validation fails (autoQuery 13/18, surfaceFailed 5, passRate 0.722). executeValidation 27/27 PASS, authContract PASS, directValidation PASS. Schema 2026-04-17 valid. iteration.action=continue.

Root-cause diagnosis: tool_selection_error is caused by STALE marketplace listing (AITool.tool_schema held 13 methods, retrieval index bundle built from 13). The 14 new methods were invisible to the agent's discovery/selection. Fix = marketplace listing refresh (metadata update, NOT a code change — done directly, not via pipeline-improver). Ran context/scripts/refresh-polymarket-listing.ts 15c60ca5...: previousCount 13 -> freshCount 27, changed=true, 14 new tools added (get_earnings, get_dividends, get_insider_activity, get_ownership, get_sec_filings, get_peers, get_growth, get_revenue_segments, get_congressional_trades, get_index_constituents, get_valuation, get_quality_scores, get_sector_performance, get_macro_calendar). Retrieval index bundle rebuilt. No server.ts change, no redeploy (server already live with 27 methods). Gate #1 (listingDiscoveryParity) closed.
filesChanged: marketplace AITool.tool_schema + retrieval index bundle (no source files)

events.detail: Reran all 14 weak/autoWeak prompts after marketplace listing refresh (13->27 methods). ALL 14 now answer (0 capability_miss, 0 errors). 3 prior capability_miss (xom-insider, meta-congressional, aapl-revenue) + 2 prior timeouts (semiconductor-sector, sp500-semiconductors, nvda-relative-value) all fixed. Listing refresh was the single causal fix: tool_selection_error/timeout were symptoms of the stale 13-tool discovery index.

Re-reviewed all 18 prompts in 3 parallel batches after rerun. satisfactionMean=4.388 (up from ~2.4 pre-refresh), weakQueryRate=0.222 (4/18), baselineBeatenRate=1.0, highFragilityRate=0.056, differentiation: 8 high / 10 moderate / 0 low. autoWeak capped: 0.

Release gates: blocked. 4 weak queries remain: jpm-ownership (2.83, high-diff, <3.0 blocker, capability_miss CIK gap), aapl-ownership (3.67, capability_miss 13F subscription + Beneish), semiconductor-sector (3.83, synthesis_gap), energy-vs-technology (3.83, tool_selection_error). Improvement gates: continue. Schema valid (2026-04-17).

Synced marketplace description via direct Postgres update + retrieval index bundle rebuild (modeled on refresh-polymarket-listing.ts). prevDescLen=2970 (only original 13 methods) -> newDescLen=4131 (all 27 methods + 14 new alpha surfaces + 10 Try-asking prompts + agent tips). toolCount preserved at 27, retrievalDocs rebuilt=28. One non-fatal embedding timeout (get_financial_ratios) with lexical fallback.

Launched pipeline-improver targeting capability_miss root cause (ownership CIK-resolution self-heal for jpm-ownership blocker + aapl-ownership Beneish fallback). Scoped mcp-fmp restart + temp-port unauth smoke per deploy safety rules.

Query route (/api/v1/query/route.ts) and chat route (/(chat)/api/chat/route.ts) share the same execution engine: both import executeIterativeExecution + buildMediatorText from @/lib/ai/iterative-execution, resolveIterativeExecutionFeatureToggles from @/lib/ai/iterative-execution-features, ExecutorDiagnostics from @/lib/ai/code-executor, synthesis-safety from @/lib/ai/synthesis-safety. Both use the SAME synthesis system-prompt builder getRegularPrompt (defined once at lib/ai/prompts.ts:429; query:72/5339, chat:93/6709/10283). Chat route has streaming/recovery wrappers (priorDataAgenticResult, recoveryResult) that delegate to the shared executeIterativeExecution — route-local wrappers, not divergence. No deterministic code-path divergence found.

Fixed capability_miss in server.ts: CIK self-heal (profile->shares-float EDGAR->SEC map) + 13F dates-bypass with computed quarter; Beneish M-score fallback from statements. Deployed scoped mcp-fmp restart, 27 tools verified. Smoke: JPM CIK 0000019617 resolved, 13F HTTP 402 surfaced explicitly; AAPL beneishMScore -2.3708 computed. Re-ran 4 weak queries: 4/4 answer, 0 capability_miss.
events.upstreamLimitation: 13F holder endpoints HTTP 402 at current FMP tier

events.detail: Re-reviewed 4 post-fix weak queries. Merged into reviewer-evaluation.json: satisfactionMean=4.453, weakQueryRate=0.111 (2/18), baselineBeatenRate=1.0. jpm-ownership improved 2.83->3.0 (CIK resolved, 402 surfaced). Weak remaining: semiconductor-sector 3.5, jpm-ownership 3.0.
Release gates: PASS. action=pass, status=ready, artifactWriteAllowed=true. Schema valid 2026-04-17.
10 manual showcase candidates (8 natural / 2 explicit chart).
Release ready after 2 iterations (iter1 listing refresh 13->27, iter2 ownership CIK+Beneish fix). 18/18 query pass, 27/27 executeValidation, description synced 4131 chars, artifact written.
